# Work Packages: Shared Money Value Object

**Inputs**: Design documents from `/kitty-specs/001-001-shared-money-value-object/`
**Prerequisites**: plan.md (implementation approach), spec.md (user stories)

**Tests**: Unit tests required per spec.

**Organization**: Fine-grained subtasks (`Txxx`) roll up into work packages (`WPxx`). Each work package must be independently deliverable and testable.

**Prompt Files**: Each work package references a matching prompt file in `/tasks/` generated by `/spec-kitty.tasks`.

---

## Work Package WP01: Money Value Object Implementation (Priority: P1)

**Goal**: Implement Money class in `src/shared/lib/money.ts` with full test coverage.
**Independent Test**: All unit tests pass; Money re-exported from `shared/lib/index.ts`.
**Prompt**: `/tasks/WP01-money-value-object.md`

### Included Subtasks
- [x] T001 Create `src/shared/lib/money.ts` with Money class
- [x] T002 Implement `Money.fromPrice(dollars)` factory method (stores cents = dollars * 100)
- [x] T003 Implement `Money.add()`, `Money.subtract()`, `Money.multiply()` arithmetic operations
- [x] T004 Implement `Money.equals()` for value equality
- [x] T005 Implement `Money.format()` with Intl.NumberFormat (USD, "$25.00" format)
- [x] T006 Create `src/shared/lib/money.test.ts` with Vitest tests
- [x] T007 Update `src/shared/lib/index.ts` to re-export Money
- [x] T008 Run quality gates: `npm run lint && npm run lint:arch && npm run build`

**Requirements Refs**: FR-001, FR-002, FR-003, FR-004, FR-005

### Implementation Notes
- Money is immutable: all operations return new Money instances
- Store cents as integer, never float
- format() uses Intl.NumberFormat for locale-aware output
- All tests must pass before claiming done

### Parallel Opportunities
- None (sequential implementation)

### Dependencies
- None (Tier 1 independent ticket)

### Risks & Mitigations
- Floating-point precision: MUST use integer cents internally
- Immutability: all methods must create new instances

---

## Dependency & Execution Summary

- **Sequence**: WP01 only (simple, single-file implementation)
- **MVP Scope**: WP01 is the entire implementation

---
